phrases.intent_en: Ask where the information desk is
phrases.text_local: Você pode me dizer onde fica o balcão de informações?
phrases.pronunciation: vo-SEH PO-de me dee-ZEHR ON-de FEE-ka oo bal-KOW dee in-for-mah-SOYNSH
phrases.cultural_note: O balcão de informações de mercados municipais costuma estar no piso térreo, próximo da entrada principal.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o balcão de informações.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW bahl-KOWN DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the information desk.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the information desk.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW bahl-KOWN DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH.
responses.local: Siga as placas para o balcão de informações.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the information desk is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o balcão de informações?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW bahl-KOWN DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH?
phrases.cultural_note: Portuguese municipal markets centralize visitor services on the ground floor for efficient traffic flow.

likely_response.local: Dirija-se a um feirante ou funcionário do mercado para indicar o balcão de informações.
likely_response.pronunciation: dee-REE-zhuh-SIH AH OONNG fay-RAHNNG-tih OHW foonng-seeoo-NAHR-yoo DOO meh-ruh-KAH-doo PUH-ruh een-dee-KAHR AW bahl-KOWN DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask a market vendor or staff member to point you to the information desk.

responses.english: Ask a market vendor or staff member to point you to the information desk.
responses.phonetic: dee-REE-zhuh-SIH AH OONNG fay-RAHNNG-tih OHW foonng-seeoo-NAHR-yoo DOO meh-ruh-KAH-doo PUH-ruh een-dee-KAHR AW bahl-KOWN DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH.
responses.local: Dirija-se a um feirante ou funcionário do mercado para indicar o balcão de informações.

phrases.text_local: Podem indicar onde fica a tasca municipal?
phrases.pronunciation: PAW-dayng een-dee-KAHR OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH TAHSH-kuh moo-nee-see-PAHL?
phrases.cultural_note: Traditional market taverns often occupy central courtyards to preserve historic architectural layouts.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, a tasca situa-se no pátio interior.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, AH TAHSH-kuh see-TOOUH-SIH NOO PAHT-yoo een-tih-REEOHR.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, the tavern is located in the interior courtyard.

responses.english: Good morning, the tavern is located in the interior courtyard.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, AH TAHSH-kuh see-TOOUH-SIH NOO PAHT-yoo een-tih-REEOHR.
responses.local: Bom dia, a tasca situa-se no pátio interior.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a peixaria central.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH pay-shuh-REEUH sayngt-RAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the central fishmonger.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the central fishmonger.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH pay-shuh-REEUH sayngt-RAHL.
responses.local: Siga as placas para a peixaria central.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to pay for parking
phrases.cultural_note: Mercados em Portugal costumam ter máquinas de estacionamento no pátio interior.

likely_response.local: Na máquina junto à entrada principal.
likely_response.pronunciation: NUH MAH-kee-nuh ZHOONNG-too AH ayngt-RAH-duh preen-see-PAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the parking machine.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the parking machine.
responses.phonetic: NUH MAH-kee-nuh ZHOONNG-too AH ayngt-RAH-duh preen-see-PAHL.
responses.local: Na máquina junto à entrada principal.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar um restaurante autêntico perto do mercado?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR OONNG rehsh-tow-RAHNNG-tih ow-TAYNG-tee-koo PEHR-too DOO meh-ruh-KAH-doo?

likely_response.local: Recomendamos a Tasca Municipal, no pátio interior do mercado.
likely_response.pronunciation: reh-koo-mayng-DAHN-moosh AH TAHSH-kuh moo-nee-see-PAHL, NOO PAHT-yoo een-tih-REEOHR DOO meh-ruh-KAH-doo.
likely_response.translation_en: We recommend the Tasca Municipal, in the inner courtyard of the market.

responses.english: We recommend the Tasca Municipal, in the inner courtyard of the market.
responses.phonetic: reh-koo-mayng-DAHN-moosh AH TAHSH-kuh moo-nee-see-PAHL, NOO PAHT-yoo een-tih-REEOHR DOO meh-ruh-KAH-doo.
responses.local: Recomendamos a Tasca Municipal, no pátio interior do mercado.
